./composer.json is valid for simple usage with Composer but has
strict errors that make it unable to be published as a package
# General errors
- License "Proprietary-Custom" is not a valid SPDX license identifier, see https://spdx.org/licenses/ if you use an open-source license.
# Publish errors
ERROR: Required package "drupal/core" is missing a version constraint.
# Warnings
WARNING: The package name "MyOrg/example_module" is invalid; it must be all lowercase.
